title: Regarding Old Lady Akagi
wikitext:
[]: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 12:24 am This has probably been brought up somewhere, Is it possible that her soul is in the MAGI system? It makes a lot more sense than her soul being in Zeroguoki, she practically landed on one of the computers (Balthazar?) when she offed herself, and Ritsuko claims her mother is 'in' the MAGI computers. So if it is at all possible, do you think she's in the computer(s)? The other mothers seemed to 'die' while near or with their respective units. This is just a thought, I was just thinking of the whole Naoko in Zero thing and this came to mind. also in b4 this thread gets off topic somehow.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 09, 2007 12:56 am Zkh wrote: This has probably been brought up somewhere, Is it possible that her soul is in the MAGI system?

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 1:02 am Well in EoE when Ritsuko tries to 'splode MAGI, it doesn't work, Ritsuko says it betrays her, and last I checked machines don't usually betray people. also lol no one likes Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Apr 09, 2007 1:13 am I believe Caspar betrays her. And by "betray" I mean, thought initiating self destruct was a bad idea.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 09, 2007 1:27 am Zkh wrote: Well in EoE when Ritsuko tries to 'splode MAGI, it doesn't work, Ritsuko says it betrays her, and last I checked machines don't usually betray people.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 1:33 am Ah, I get it now. Well it was worth a shot. But it's true she never got any lovin(being used doesn't count as love), in the series, fanboys are NOT canon to the plot, contrary to popular beliefs.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Apr 09, 2007 1:34 am Zkh wrote: Ah, I get it now. Well it was worth a shot. But it's true she never got any lovin(being used doesn't count as love), in the series, fanboys are NOT canon to the plot, contrary to popular beliefs.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 09, 2007 1:52 am Zkh wrote: But it's true she never got any lovin(being used doesn't count as love)

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 2:05 am Reichu wrote: Zkh wrote: But it's true she never got any lovin(being used doesn't count as love)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 09, 2007 2:11 am Zkh wrote: Didn't she say she hated Naoko as a mother? Or was that as a person?

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 2:22 am Reichu wrote: But that's just because she was sex0ring Gendo, LOL.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 09, 2007 2:54 am Zkh wrote: On a personal note, Gendo is worth being jealous for, he had BIG plans for Yui when he got back to her, if you know what I mean

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 12:51 pm Thanks for the scripts, they will come in handy. Also, that link made me see Gendo in a way I can never forget. So it's settled, Ritsuko's mom is DEAD. Good riddance. No one strangles Rei and lives.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Mon Apr 09, 2007 2:58 pm Reichu wrote: also lol no one likes Ritsuko.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 09, 2007 3:21 pm Zkh wrote: also lol no one likes Ritsuko.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 3:37 pm Mr. Tines wrote: For the record, this is the picture I tend to post in the "Mai waifu" threads on /a/.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Mon Apr 09, 2007 3:49 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Zkh wrote: also lol no one likes Ritsuko.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 09, 2007 3:52 pm Zkh wrote: I meant no one likes her in the series.

[]: Re: Regarding Old Lady Akagi             Quote Post by Zkh » Mon Apr 09, 2007 3:57 pm Mr. Tines wrote: She and Misato seem to be friends"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 09, 2007 4:51 pm What I wanted to ask, since its related, is am I the only one who sees a parallel between Frau Doctor/Stepmutter and Akagi Naoko? Both the "Women in them" won out as opposed to the "Mother in them"... LOL 26' foreshadowing (Plat epi.13) wrote: RITSUKO: Casper contains the pattern of her as a woman. She stayed a woman to the last. How totally like my mother.
